raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to dsirdeju es ta
RUNGA Balsi fakkam: Kurru
fuhtischu es? un kas mums ees?
Tad fazztiju es: Redſche es ef-
mu/ fuhtt mann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztija Winsch: Eij/
un takti us ſcheem Laudim:
Dsirdeet gan ilgi/ bet ne faproh-
teet/ un redſeet gan ilgi/ bet ne
nenmeet wehra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Apreppe ſcho Lauschu
Sirđi/ un darri winno Ausis
beesas/ un apſtulbo winno Az-
zis/ ka tee ar jawahm Azzim ne
reds/ un ar jawahm Aufin ne
dsird/ un ar jawu Sirđi ne fa-
proht/ nedg atgreeschahs / nedg
wiſch tohs dſceedins.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztiju es: Zik ugi
KUNGS? un wiſch fazztija :
Ramchr tee Pilsfahti taps poh-
ſiti/ ka Eedsihwotaja wairs ne
buhs/ un tee Nammi/ ka Zitweka
eelfch teem wairs ne buhs/ un ta
Gemme wiſhai buhs nopohſtita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS dſihe
tobs Zitwekus tahtu nahſt/ unta
Atſtahſchana buhs leela. Seim-
wes Widdii.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr ta defnitfa Tee-
fa eekſch tahs wehl paliks / un
atgreefisees/ bet buhs atkat par
Pohſtſchannu itt ka Ohsots un
ka Leeva/ kam tas Zelns pa-
lek pehz (to Lappu) Bircha-
uns/weens fivehtajs Dſinnmums
tas puts Zelns buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir tas netikkahs ee
ſtahm Deenahm Al
ta Dehla Jotama/
Dehla Uſijns ta Rehnina
Juhda/ Ka Rezins tas Rehnir
no Sihrjas/ un Pekaüs
malljus Dehls tas Israēta
niſch us Jerufalemi zehla
prett winnu karroht/ bet wiſ
ne eefpehje prett winnu nene
karrodams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tappe tam Dahwi
Namman fluddinahts un ſa
zihts : Tee Sihreti paſanja
us Eewrāimu. Tad drebb
winna Sirđs un winna La-
schu Sirđs/ itt ka tee Mesc
Kohki dreb no Wehja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fazzi
us Esniju : Iſeiij jelle Akafa
pretti/ tu un taws Dehls Sea
Jasubs / tai Raktā to Uhden
Stohbru ta augſcheja Dihtā
Zettmalli pee ta Wadmalnee
Tihrunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un takti us winnu : Sa-
gajees un eſti kluſſu/ ne bihſtee
un lat tawa Sirđs ne baita-
preeſich teem diwi Galleem fel-
kivehpainu Baagali/ preeſich tah
Duſmitbas Rezinga / un to Si-
reju/ un ta Dehla Remalijus.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
